ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the tire (e.g., 16.0 x 7.0-10) */,
  "od" TEXT /* Outside diameter of the tire */,
  "tread_width" TEXT /* Tread width of the tire */,
  "section_width" TEXT /* Section width of the tire */,
  "recom_rim" TEXT /* Recommended rim size for the tire */,
  "compound" TEXT /* Compound of the tire (e.g., W3) */,
  "compound_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tire compound */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Approximate weight of the tire */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the tire */,
  "sae_price" REAL /* SAE price of the tire */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of tire (e.g., passenger, truck, SUV) */,
  "speed_rating" TEXT /* Speed rating of the tire */,
  "load_index" TEXT /* Load index of the tire */,
  "tire_class" TEXT /* Class of the tire (e.g., economy, premium, high-performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location of the inventory */,
  "bin_number" TEXT /* Bin number of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date and time of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who processed the sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the sale belongs to */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method of the sale */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate of the sales representative */,
  "sales_target" REAL /* Sales target of the sales representative */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who processed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Shipping date of the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Delivery date of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method of the order */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the order item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the discount applies to */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the discount */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase required for the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate (e.g., 0.08 for 8%) */,
  "tax_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax rate */,
  "tax_description" TEXT /* Description of the tax rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
